commands.review_summary:
Adds RFC 0007 proposing storage-neutral plugin SDK session/transcript APIs, deprecation and removal rules, verification requirements, and a 23-PR OpenClaw compatibility matrix.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is an RFC/documentation PR rather than a runtime bug. Source inspection verifies the added Markdown, metadata, and compatibility policy text.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers need to decide the public SDK compatibility policy and RFC acceptance state; the remaining action is not a narrow automated repair contract.

target.title: docs: propose plugin sdk session storage migration
target.body:
## What

Proposes RFC 0007 for the plugin SDK session/transcript storage migration strategy.

## Why

The SQLite migration needs storage-neutral SDK replacements for file-shaped session and transcript APIs, while giving external plugin authors a clear pre-SQLite deprecation window.

## Changes

- Adds RFC 0007 for session/transcript storage migration
- Defines replacement API areas and compatibility rules
- Adds a tracked PR compatibility matrix
- Requires docs and plugin-inspector deprecation visibility
- Clarifies `cleanupSessionLifecycleArtifacts` as the narrow dreaming cleanup SDK surface

## Verification

- `/Users/phaedrus/.codex/worktrees/1299/clawdbot/.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`
- `git diff --check`
target.author: jalehman
